title: AI Voice Calling Agent
tagline: AI Calls Your Leads in 2 Seconds. Humans Take 30 Minutes.
description: Deploy an autonomous AI voice agent that calls, qualifies, and nurtures leads 24/7 — handling abandoned carts, appointment booking, and outbound follow-ups without a single human in the loop.

title: WhatsApp AI Automation
tagline: Your 24/7 Sales Rep on WhatsApp — Fully Automated.
description: Set up an intelligent WhatsApp chatbot that answers queries, sends personalized offers, qualifies leads, and routes them to the right team — all automatically without manual effort.

title: Predictive Lead Scoring AI
tagline: Know Which Leads Will Buy — Before They Even Enquire.
description: Our AI analyzes your historical customer data, behavioral signals, and engagement patterns to assign a conversion probability score to every new lead — so your sales team always contacts the hottest prospects first.

title: AI Competitor Intelligence
tagline: See Every Move Your Competitor Makes — In Real Time.
description: AI monitors your competitors' ad creatives, landing pages, pricing changes, new offers, and social media strategy daily — delivering weekly intelligence reports so you always stay one step ahead.

title: AI Dynamic Pricing Engine
tagline: Maximize Revenue by Selling at the Perfect Price Every Time.
description: AI automatically adjusts your product prices in real-time based on demand signals, competitor pricing, inventory levels, and customer segments — maximizing revenue per order without manual intervention.

title: AI Customer LTV Predictor
tagline: Find Your Best Customers Before They Even Know It.
description: AI analyzes purchase patterns, frequency, and behavior to calculate the Lifetime Value of every customer — helping you invest retention budget only on high-value customers and increase overall profitability.

title: AI Video Personalization
tagline: Send 10,000 Customers a Personalized Video — All at Once.
description: Generate thousands of personalized video messages at scale — each one auto-customized with the customer's name, location, and purchase history — creating hyper-personal engagement that drives 5x more replies.

title: AI Product Recommendation Engine
tagline: Show Every Customer Exactly What They Want to Buy Next.
description: Embed an intelligent recommendation engine on your store that analyzes browsing, purchase history, and similar user behavior to auto-display personalized product suggestions — increasing average order value significantly.

title: AI Sentiment & Social Listening
tagline: Know What the Internet Is Saying About You — Instantly.
description: AI scans thousands of social media posts, reviews, news articles, and forums in real-time to detect brand mentions, analyze sentiment trends, and alert you instantly to viral crises or growth opportunities.

title: AI Ad Fraud Detection
tagline: Stop Wasting Budget on Fake Clicks & Bot Traffic.
description: AI monitors your Google and Meta ad traffic in real time to detect invalid clicks, bot traffic, click farms, and competitor click fraud — automatically blocking fraudulent IPs and recovering wasted ad spend.
